generated_oml:
@prefix DTDFVocab: https://example.com/DTDFVocab# .
@prefix rdfs: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema# .
@prefix base: http://example.com/base# .

instance HeatBed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating component for contents inside styrofoam box, actuated by controller with safety constraints to prevent overheating"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for distributing heat evenly within incubator enclosure"
]

instance Controller : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller that interfaces with Digital Twin to actuate heatbed, processes commands for precise temperature control with safety constraints"
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer deployed inside incubator for temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataRabbitMQ
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer deployed inside incubator for temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataRabbitMQ
]

instance TemperatureDataRabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2
    base:desc "Temperature data transmitted via RabbitMQ communication server from physical sensors"
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous temperature data collected from physical sensors for real-time analysis and model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataRabbitMQ
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance ThermalDynamicModel1 : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamic simulation model for predicting temperature within incubator environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, PhysicsSimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalDynamicModel2 : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamic simulation model for predicting temperature within incubator environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, PhysicsSimulationEnabler
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for updating model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance PhysicsSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Differential equation-based dynamic models for physics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance RabbitMQServer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ communication server for real-time data exchange between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design model for geometric representation of incubator"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Specialized algorithm for fault detection in incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimation algorithm for monitoring system state"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithm for operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory control algorithm for system regulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of safety and performance using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationDetected, OptimalityViolationDetected
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation of physical behavior for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedTemperatureInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection in incubator system components"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation of current incubator operational state"
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentStateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of incubator operational parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlSettingsInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control for regulating incubator temperature and fan speed"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatbedPowerAction, AdjustFanSpeedAction
]

instance SafetyViolationDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violation in incubator temperature exceeding safe limits"
]

instance OptimalityViolationDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected operational inefficiency in incubator performance"
]

instance PredictedTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature profile based on thermal simulation models"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detected in incubator heating or cooling system"
]

instance CurrentStateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of incubator system components"
]

instance OptimalControlSettingsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal control settings for efficient temperature regulation"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedPowerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed power to maintain safe temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of fan speed for even heat distribution"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environment models with best parameter estimates; monitors validate model fidelity by checking system performance against safety and optimization criteria, triggering human or algorithmic interventions upon violation detection."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT's technical connection utilizes a RabbitMQ message broker deployed on a Raspberry Pi, leveraging its built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth capabilities for wireless communication. The network architecture is centralized around the Pi, handling data exchange between physical devices and digital components through RabbitMQ without explicit specification of additional protocols."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "In order keep the device in a safe state, a safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver. Additionally, insulation is implemented to minimise the potential impact of the environment."
]
